name: Square
description: Square API enables payment processing, customer management, catalog operations, and order management. Accept payments, manage inventory, track customers, and generate invoices programmatically.

capabilities.name: create_payment
capabilities.description: Process a payment using Square's payment gateway. Supports card payments, digital wallets, and other payment methods.

capabilities.name: list_payments
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of payments with filtering by date range, source, and other criteria.

capabilities.name: create_customer
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record with contact information, email, and phone number for future transactions.

capabilities.name: search_customers
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve customers by name, email, phone number, or other criteria.

capabilities.name: list_catalog
capabilities.description: Retrieve items, variations, and pricing information from your Square catalog.

capabilities.name: create_invoice
capabilities.description: Generate and send invoices to customers with payment links, due dates, and itemized line items.

capabilities.name: list_orders
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve orders with detailed information including items, totals, fulfillment status, and customer details.
